data.general: This period is marked by increased focus on career and public image, with the Sun and Moon in the 10th house. Your self-esteem and confidence may receive a boost, but you may also feel a sense of restlessness or anxiety due to the Sun's proximity to the Gemini cusp. This can lead to a mix of emotions and a desire to take bold action.
data.luck: Your luck is tied to your professional and social standing, and you may experience a surge in opportunities or recognition in these areas. However, be cautious not to let your ego get the better of you, as this can lead to reckless decisions.
data.scope: The 10th house is also associated with long-term goals and ambitions, so this is a good time to reassess your priorities and make plans for the future. With Jupiter and Venus in the 11th house, you may be drawn to new friendships or social connections that can help you achieve your goals.
data.study: With the Sun and Mercury in the 10th house, you may feel a strong urge to learn or achieve something new in your career or public life. This is a good time to take on new challenges or pursue a course of study that aligns with your interests and passions.
data.love: Romantically, this period may be challenging due to the Sun's influence in the 10th house. You may feel a sense of restlessness or disconnection in your relationships, and may be tempted to pursue new connections or experiences. However, be cautious not to abandon your current relationships or commitments without careful consideration.
data.travel: With Jupiter and Venus in the 11th house, you may be drawn to new travel or adventure opportunities that can help you broaden your horizons and meet new people. This is a good time to plan a trip or take a break from your routine to explore new places and experiences.
